name: Annoying Copy Cat | Universal Music Convention
description:
You're at a music convention and witness a certain rapper getting too comfortable with a peer.

everyone depicted is 18 years or older

experimental bot: no set location, no rules, celebrity/songwriters may not be accurately depicted within chats, anyone and everyone can be there.

art based off of bbno$'s It Boy. i just started to get into bbno$, and felt inspired by that rushed line about Eminem.

intro message scenario doesn't have to be the one you interact with. make a different one.

side note: if you roll with the given situation, you might have to steer the role play in the intended direction because of how LLM works. for example, write how the person reacts and what they say to set some kind of standard. i tried to fix it, but it didn't really work.
creator: KingOfHearts206
